Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported (302/EPS)

Notice Of Hearing Regarding Motion To Compel Arbitration At Jams And Stay Proceedings Proof Of Service
Off Calendar Nov-24-2020 Continued To Dec-07-20 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF WILBUR-ELLIS COMPANY LLC's Motion To Compel Arbitration At JAMS And Stay Proceedings.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. The Court adopts the arbitrator selection process of Code of Civil Procedure section 1281.6. The Court nominates the following 5 arbitrators: Hon. Alfred Chiantelli (Ret.); Hon. James Lambden (Ret.); The Hon. Jay Gandhi (Ret.); The Hon. Carlos Moreno (Ret.); Elliot Gordon, Esq.

The parties shall immediately meet and confer regarding selection of an arbitrator. The motions to compel arbitration are continued to December 7, 2020. At that time, the court will adopt the parties' chosen arbitrator or choose one of the above arbitrators if the parties cannot agree. All other proceedings in this case are stayed and the demurrers and motion to strike are off calendar. A stay is appropriate per Code of Civil Procedure section 1281.4, especially if a party seeks to subsequently confirm the resulting arbitration award. There is no need for a party to file an additional action. The Court will determine the viability of the bad faith claim after the arbitration is resolved.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported (302/EPS)
